problem_text_cn:
## 七、(26分)

如图所示，质量同为$m$的两个等腰直角三角形斜木块平放在水平光滑地面上，且已通过某种约束使它们不会翻转，两个斜面底端相互接触。一根劲度系数为$k$，自由长度恰好等于每个斜木块底面长度两倍的弹性轻杆，两端分别连接质量同为$m$的小球，开始时两个小球静止在两个斜木块顶端。自由释放后，两个小球可以无摩擦地沿斜面滑动，弹性杆随之在竖直方向上运动，过程中假设杆始终处于水平状态。将斜木块给小球的支持力大小记为$N$，已知小球开始运动后$N$第二次达到极小值时，杆刚好落地，试求$N$第二次达到极大值时杆的长度。
problem_text_en:
## Seven. (26 points)

As shown in the figure, two identical isosceles‑right‑triangular wooden blocks, each of mass $m$, lie flat on a smooth horizontal ground. They are constrained so that they cannot overturn, and the bases of the two inclined surfaces are in mutual contact. A light elastic rod with stiffness coefficient $k$, whose free length equals exactly twice the base length of each block, connects two balls, each also of mass $m$. Initially, the balls are at rest at the apexes of the two blocks. After being released freely, the balls can slide frictionlessly down the slopes, and the elastic rod moves correspondingly in the vertical direction; it is assumed that the rod remains horizontal throughout the process. Let the magnitude of the normal force exerted by a block on a ball be denoted by $N$. It is known that when $N$ attains its second minimum after the balls start moving, the rod just touches the ground. Determine the length of the rod when $N$ attains its second maximum.
problem_solution_cn:
## 七、(26分)

参考题解图，图中虚线所示为两个斜木块初始位置，顶端取为坐标原点$O$，为左侧小球朝右、朝下运动设置$x$，$y$坐标轴，为左侧斜木块朝左运动设置$\xi$坐标轴。每一个斜木块底面长记为$L$，则高也为$L$。建立下述方程：

球：$N\sin\theta - k \cdot 2x = m\ddot{x}$，$mg - N\cos\theta = m\ddot{y}$，

木块：$N\sin\theta = m\ddot{\xi}$，(4分)

运动关联：$y = (x + \xi)\tan\theta$。

将其中木块方程所得
$$ N = m\ddot{\xi} / \sin\theta $$
代入小球方程，并将$\theta = 45^{\circ}$代入，经数学处理后，可得
$$ \ddot{\xi} = \ddot{x} + \frac{2k}{m}x, \tag{1} $$
$$ \ddot{y} + \ddot{\xi} = g, \tag{2} $$
$$ \ddot{y} = \ddot{x} + \ddot{\xi}. \tag{3} \qquad(3\text{分}) $$

(ⅰ) $\ddot{x}$方程的建立和求解

(2)、(3)式联立，消去$\ddot{y}$，得
$$ \ddot{x} + 2\ddot{\xi} = g, \tag{4} $$
将(1)式代入(4)式，得
$$ \ddot{x} + \frac{4k}{3m}x = \frac{g}{3}, $$
通解为
$$ \begin{cases}x = A\cos(\omega t + \phi) + \dfrac{mg}{4k}, \\ \omega = \sqrt{4k/3m},\end{cases} $$
$$ \dot{x} = -\omega A\sin(\omega t + \phi). $$
由初件$t = 0$时，$x = 0$，$\dot{x} = 0$，得
$$ \begin{cases}A\cos\phi + \dfrac{mg}{4k} = 0, \\ -\sqrt{\dfrac{4k}{3m}}\,A\sin\phi = 0, \;\Rightarrow\; \phi = 0 \text{ 或 } \pi. \end{cases} $$
取$\phi = 0$，则$A = -\dfrac{mg}{4k}$, $\Rightarrow$ $x = (1 - \cos\omega t)\dfrac{mg}{4k}$,
取$\phi = \pi$，则$A = mg/4k$, $\Rightarrow$ $x = [1 + \cos(\omega t + \pi)]\dfrac{mg}{4k}$.
可统一为
$$ x = (1 - \cos\omega t)\dfrac{mg}{4k}, $$
$$ \Rightarrow \ddot{x} = \frac{g}{3}\cos\omega t, \quad \omega = \sqrt{4k/3m}. $$

(ⅱ) $\ddot{\xi}$方程的建立和求解

由(1)式，得
$$ \ddot{\xi} = \ddot{x} + \frac{2k}{m}x = \frac{g}{3}\cos\omega t + \frac{2k}{m}(1 - \cos\omega t)\frac{mg}{4k}, $$
积分，得
$$ \dot{\xi}=-\frac{g}{6\omega}\sin\omega t+\frac{1}{2}gt+C_{1},\; t=0\text{时,}\dot{\xi}=0,\Rightarrow C_{1}=0, $$
$$ \Rightarrow\xi=\frac{g}{6\omega^{2}}\cos\omega t+\frac{1}{4}gt^{2}+C_{2},\; t=0\text{时,}\xi=0,\Rightarrow C_{2}=-\frac{g}{6\omega^{2}}, $$
$$ \Rightarrow\xi=\frac{mg}{8k}(\cos\omega t-1)+\frac{1}{4}gt^{2}.\qquad(5\text{分}) $$

讨论：
$$ \ddot{\xi}=-\frac{g}{6}\cos\omega t+\frac{g}{2},\Rightarrow\frac{2}{3}g\geqslant\ddot{\xi}\geqslant\frac{g}{3}>0, $$
$$ \Rightarrow N=\frac{m}{\sin\phi}\ddot{\xi}>0, $$ 故弹性杆落地前，小球不会离开斜面。

(ⅲ) $y(t)$的求解

由$y=(x+\xi)\tan\theta = x+\xi$，得
$$ y=\frac{mg}{8k}(1-\cos\omega t)+\frac{1}{4}gt^{2}.\qquad(2\text{分}) $$

(ⅳ) 斜木块底面长度$L$
$$ N=\frac{m}{\sin\phi}\ddot{\xi}=\sqrt{2}m\bigl(-\frac{g}{6}\cos\omega t+\frac{g}{2}\bigr), $$
$N$第二次极小值对应：
$$ t=2T=2(2\pi/\omega)=2\pi\sqrt{3m/k}, $$
此时有
$$ L=y\mid_{t=2T}=\frac{1}{4}gt^{2}\mid_{t=2\pi\sqrt{3m/k}}, $$
得
$$ L=3\pi^{2}\frac{mg}{k}.\qquad(3\text{分}) $$

(V) $N$第二次达到极大值时杆的长度$l$
$N$第二次达极大值对应：
$$ t=\frac{3}{2}T=\frac{3\pi}{2}\sqrt{3m/k}, $$
此时杆长为
$$ l=(2L-x)\mid_{t=\frac{3}{2}T}=[2L-2(1-\cos\omega t)\frac{mg}{4k}]\mid_{\cos\omega t=-1}, $$
$$ \Rightarrow l=(6\pi^{2}-1)\frac{mg}{k}.\qquad(2\text{分}) $$
problem_solution_en:
## Seven. (26 points)

Refer to the solution diagram. The dashed lines show the initial positions of the two blocks. The apex is taken as coordinate origin $O$. For the left ball moving right‑ and downward, set up $x$, $y$ axes; for the left block moving left, set up a $\xi$ axis. Denote the base length of each block as $L$, then its height is also $L$. The following equations are established:

Ball: $N\sin\theta - k \cdot 2x = m\ddot{x}$, $mg - N\cos\theta = m\ddot{y}$,

Block: $N\sin\theta = m\ddot{\xi}$, (4 points)

Kinematic relation: $y = (x + \xi)\tan\theta$.

Substituting $N = m\ddot{\xi} / \sin\theta$ from the block equation into the ball equations, and using $\theta = 45^{\circ}$, after mathematical manipulation we obtain
$$ \ddot{\xi} = \ddot{x} + \frac{2k}{m}x, \tag{1} $$
$$ \ddot{y} + \ddot{\xi} = g, \tag{2} $$
$$ \ddot{y} = \ddot{x} + \ddot{\xi}. \tag{3} \qquad(3\text{ points}) $$

(ⅰ) Equation for $\ddot{x}$ and its solution

Combining (2) and (3) to eliminate $\ddot{y}$ gives
$$ \ddot{x} + 2\ddot{\xi} = g, \tag{4} $$
Substituting (1) into (4) yields
$$ \ddot{x} + \frac{4k}{3m}x = \frac{g}{3}, $$
whose general solution is
$$ \begin{cases}x = A\cos(\omega t + \phi) + \dfrac{mg}{4k}, \\ \omega = \sqrt{4k/3m},\end{cases} \quad \dot{x} = -\omega A\sin(\omega t + \phi). $$
Initial conditions at $t = 0$: $x = 0$, $\dot{x} = 0$, give
$$ \begin{cases}A\cos\phi + \dfrac{mg}{4k} = 0, \\ -\sqrt{\dfrac{4k}{3m}}\,A\sin\phi = 0, \;\Rightarrow\; \phi = 0 \text{ or } \pi. \end{cases} $$
Taking $\phi = 0$ gives $A = -\dfrac{mg}{4k}$, hence $x = (1 - \cos\omega t)\dfrac{mg}{4k}$.
Taking $\phi = \pi$ gives $A = mg/4k$, hence $x = [1 + \cos(\omega t + \pi)]\dfrac{mg}{4k}$.
Thus we can write uniformly
$$ x = (1 - \cos\omega t)\dfrac{mg}{4k}, $$
$$ \Rightarrow \ddot{x} = \frac{g}{3}\cos\omega t, \quad \omega = \sqrt{4k/3m}. $$

(ⅱ) Equation for $\ddot{\xi}$ and its solution

From (1),
$$ \ddot{\xi} = \ddot{x} + \frac{2k}{m}x = \frac{g}{3}\cos\omega t + \frac{2k}{m}(1 - \cos\omega t)\frac{mg}{4k}, $$
Integrating,
$$ \dot{\xi}=-\frac{g}{6\omega}\sin\omega t+\frac{1}{2}gt+C_{1},\; t=0\text{; }\dot{\xi}=0,\Rightarrow C_{1}=0, $$
$$ \Rightarrow\xi=\frac{g}{6\omega^{2}}\cos\omega t+\frac{1}{4}gt^{2}+C_{2},\; t=0\text{; }\xi=0,\Rightarrow C_{2}=-\frac{g}{6\omega^{2}}, $$
$$ \Rightarrow\xi=\frac{mg}{8k}(\cos\omega t-1)+\frac{1}{4}gt^{2}.\qquad(5\text{ points}) $$

Discussion:
$$ \ddot{\xi}=-\frac{g}{6}\cos\omega t+\frac{g}{2},\Rightarrow\frac{2}{3}g\geqslant\ddot{\xi}\geqslant\frac{g}{3}>0, $$
$$ \Rightarrow N=\frac{m}{\sin\phi}\ddot{\xi}>0, $$ so before the rod touches the ground, the balls do not lose contact with the slopes.

(ⅲ) Solution for $y(t)$

Since $y=(x+\xi)\tan\theta = x+\xi$ (with $\theta=45^{\circ}$),
$$ y=\frac{mg}{8k}(1-\cos\omega t)+\frac{1}{4}gt^{2}.\qquad(2\text{ points}) $$

(ⅳ) Base length $L$ of a block
$$ N=\frac{m}{\sin\phi}\ddot{\xi}=\sqrt{2}m\bigl(-\frac{g}{6}\cos\omega t+\frac{g}{2}\bigr), $$
The second minimum of $N$ occurs at
$$ t=2T=2(2\pi/\omega)=2\pi\sqrt{3m/k}, $$
and at that instant
$$ L=y\mid_{t=2T}=\frac{1}{4}gt^{2}\mid_{t=2\pi\sqrt{3m/k}}, $$
hence
$$ L=3\pi^{2}\frac{mg}{k}.\qquad(3\text{ points}) $$

(V) Length $l$ of the rod when $N$ attains its second maximum
$N$ reaches its second maximum at
$$ t=\frac{3}{2}T=\frac{3\pi}{2}\sqrt{3m/k}, $$
and the rod length at that moment is
$$ l=(2L-x)\mid_{t=\frac{3}{2}T}=[2L-2(1-\cos\omega t)\frac{mg}{4k}]\mid_{\cos\omega t=-1}, $$
$$ \Rightarrow l=(6\pi^{2}-1)\frac{mg}{k}.\qquad(2\text{ points}) $$
img_cn: 图示为一个力学系统，包含两个质量同为$m$的等腰直角三角形斜木块，平放在水平光滑地面上，斜面底端相互接触。一根劲度系数为$k$、自由长度等于每个斜木块底面长度两倍的弹性轻杆，两端各连接一个质量为$m$的小球。初始时小球静止在斜木块顶端。释放后小球可无摩擦沿斜面滑动，杆始终水平。斜木块对小球的支持力大小为$N$。题目要求：当$N$第二次达到极小值时杆刚好落地，求$N$第二次达到极大值时杆的长度。图中展示了斜木块、小球、弹性杆的几何布置，并标注了一个小球所受支持力$N$的方向。
img_en: The diagram illustrates a mechanical system consisting of two identical isosceles‑right‑triangular wooden blocks, each of mass $m$, lying flat on a smooth horizontal ground, with the bases of the inclined surfaces in mutual contact. A light elastic rod of stiffness $k$, whose free length equals twice the base length of each block, connects two balls, each of mass $m$. Initially, the balls are at rest at the apexes of the blocks. After release, the balls can slide frictionlessly down the slopes, while the rod remains horizontal. The magnitude of the normal force exerted by a block on a ball is $N$. The problem states: when $N$ attains its second minimum after the balls start moving, the rod just touches the ground. Determine the length of the rod when $N$ attains its second maximum. The diagram shows the geometric arrangement of the blocks, balls, and elastic rod, and indicates the direction of the normal force $N$ on one ball.
problem_answer: 当$N$第二次达到极大值时，杆的长度为$l = (6\pi^{2}-1)\dfrac{mg}{k}$。
